This is a set of instructions that guide: Ɗum ko teemedere yamirooje peewnooɗe Ballitooɗo AI no jaabtoroo. Ɗum wallitata AI hokka humpito nafowɗo e goongɗinɗo sabu hokka naamne ɗee saraaji.
Enter a prompt or type \"/\" to select a: Naatnu tinndinol walla tap "/" ngam suɓaade tinndinol...
Add your personal instructions to custom: Ɓeydu yamirooje maa keeriɗɗe ngam feewnude no AI jaabtortoo. Ɗee ena njokkondiree e peewe jikkuuji baasal ɗe tabbintinta jaabte ballitiiɗe, laaɓtuɗe, e kisɗe.
Tip: Type \"/\" to select from saved pro: Humpito: Tap "/" ngam suɓaade e nder maale tinndinooje danndaaɗe.
Higher values produce more creative and: Ɓure toowɗe mbaɗat jaabte cosaaɗe e ceertuɗe, ɓure les-lesɗe ɓuri tiiɗde e humpitaade.
Enable for a more natural reading experi: Hurmin ngam ƴeewngal janngol ɓurngol tabiɗde
Higher values produce more creative and: Ɓure toowɗe mbaɗat jaabte cosaaɗe e ceertuɗe, ɓure les-lesɗe ɓuri tiiɗde e humpitaade.

Access the app directly from your home s: Heɓ jaaɓnirgal ngal sara e yaynirde galle maa
Works offline with cached conversations: Ena golloo e ɗo geese alaa e jokkondire mooftaaɗe
Faster loading and better performance: Loowol ɓurngol yaawde e golle ɓurɗe moƴƴude

PWA Install Tip: 💡 Humpito: Aafu caggal naatnugol ngam mooftude ñeɲtinol maa tee heɓ ƴeewngal ɓurngol moƴƴude.

agents.formatDescription: Mbaydi: asst_xxxxx (iwde MSF AI Assistant Foundry)
agents.importantInfo: Oo wakiilu ena heɓa saraaji jokkondiral tee ena waawi huutoraade kuutorɗe masiŋaaji goowɗi ɗii. Tabbintina ID Wakiilu oo ena woni no haaniri sabu ɗum waylatake caggal.

agents.noAgentsInFile: Alaa wakiiluuji yiytaaɗi e fiilde naatneteende

Alaa daande woodi.

Ena duumii haa waylaama walla itaama.

customAgents.advancedFeatureDesc: Wakiiluuji Keeriɗɗi ena ngollii e Azure AI Foundry e kuutorɗe keeriɗɗe. Ena hatojini jokkondiral e goomu karallaagal Ballitooɗo AI ngam sosde ID wakiiluuji.
customAgents.selectFromDropdown: Suɓo wakiiluuji keeriɗɗi iwde e doggol masiŋaaji

languageSupport.title: Ɗemɗe 54 Wallitaaɗe

pwa.title: Aafu hono Jaaɓnirgal Cinndel
pwa.description: Jaaɓnirgal Geese Yeeso e ƴeewngal tigi
pwa.installTip: Humpito: Aafu caggal naatnugol ngam mooftude ñeɲtinol maa tee heɓ ƴeewngal ɓurngol moƴƴude.
pwa.step2: Uddit Teelte → Jaaɓnirgal Cinndel ngam yamirooje ceɓɓitiiɗe
pwa.step3: E cinndel: Tap doggol geesiyankooɗo (⋮ walla ⚙️)
pwa.step4: Yiylo "Ɓeydu e Yaynirde Galle" walla "Aafu Jaaɓnirgal"
pwa.benefit1: Hurmin hono jaaɓnirgal tigi iwde yaynirde galle
pwa.benefit2: Yaynirde timmuɗo tawi alaa yeeso geesiyankooɗo
pwa.benefit3: Heɓol e ɗo alaa geese jokkondire danndaaɗe

contact.title: Jokkondiral & Dalilaaji
contact.description: Jokkondiru e goomu amen tee heɓ jokke ballitiiɗe

resources.title: Dalilaaji Goɗɗi

resources.githubDescription: Ƴeew dokkol, ñaawtu caɗeele, tee wallit e GitHub

support.organizationDescription: Suɓo fedde maa MSF ngam ƴeewde jokkondiral wallitorde moƴƴo
support.escalationDescription: Rewu laawol toowngol IT fedde maa ngam wallitorde
support.escalationShort: Jokkondiru e wallitorde IT nokkuure maa
support.escalationStep1: Jokkondiru e wallitorde IT nokkuure maa arande
support.escalationStep2: So ɗum ñaawaaka, toown to catal IT Nokku Golle (OC) maa
support.escalationStep3: So ɗum ñaawaaka taawo, IT OC ena waawi toownude to SITS (Gollal IT Lollingal)

settings.Model Response Settings Description: Teeltu ɓure goowɗe ngam jaabte masiŋ AI. Masiŋaaji ceertuɗi ena kuutoroo teelte ceertuɗe.
settings.reasoningEffortDescription: Ɗowata luggiɗgol miijo ngam masiŋaaji miijo. Tiiɗndam ɓurɗo toowde mahata ƴeewndital ɓurngo luggiɗde.
settings.verbosityDescription: Ɗowata tolno humpito jaabtol ngam masiŋaaji GPT-5.
settings.Controls how smoothly text appears durin: Ɗowata no binndi ɗii hollirtee weelno tuma jaabte AI
settings.Reset Confirmation Message: Aɗa tannyoraa yiɗde firtude teelte fof? Ɗum artirat ɓure goowɗe ngam ngulndam, maanditol, e cuɓe goɗɗe. Jokkondire maa, tinndinooje, e daande maa mbaylotaako.
settings.storageAlmostFull: Mooftirde ina fawii heɓde! Miijii laaɓɓitinde jokkondire ɓooynooɗe.
settings.storageUsageNormal: Kuutoragol mooftirde ena woodi no haaniri
settings.backupDescription: Sos ndanndiin timmuɗo keɓe maa fof tawi e jokkondire, tinndinooje, daande, kusorɗe, e teelte.
settings.clearDataWarning: Momtu daartol jokkondire fof iwde mooftirde nokkuure. Ɗum waawaa firteede.
settings.teamTemplatesDescription: Renndin tinndinooje maa, daande, kusorɗe, e wakiiluuji keeriɗɗi e fiilde lollinoore nde terɗe goomu goɗɗe mbaawi naatnude.
settings.Display Name Description: Suɓo no innde maa hollirtee e nder jowtaali e nder jaaɓnirgal ngal fof
settings.displayNameUIOnly: Ɗum ɗowata no innde maa hollirtee e jaaɓnirgal ngal. AI yiyataa ɗum si tawii a hurminaani lollingol e Teelte Yeewtere.
settings.Scan this QR code with your mobile devic: Sakan ngol dokkol QR e cinndel maa ngam fuɗɗaade aafgol
settings.Access the app directly from your home s: Heɓ jaaɓnirgal ngal sara e yaynirde galle maa
settings.Works offline with cached conversations: Ena golloo e ɗo geese alaa e jokkondire mooftaaɗe
settings.Faster loading and better performance: Loowol ɓurngol yaawde e golle ɓurɗe moƴƴude
settings.PWA Safari Warning: ⚠️ Aɗa foti huutoraade geesiyankooɗo Safari e iOS - Chrome e geesiyankooɓe woɗɓe mballitaako aafde jaaɓnirɗe geese e iOS.
settings.PWA Install Tip: 💡 Humpito: So aafaama, aɗa waawi hurminde jaaɓnirgal ngal iwde yaynirde galle maa hono jaaɓnirgal goowɗo - alaa hatojinde geesiyankooɗo!
settings.PWA Note: Tinndina: Ɗum ko Jaaɓnirgal Geese Yeeso (PWA). Ena aafoo hono jaaɓnirgal tigi kono ena golloo rewrude e karallaagal geesiyankooɗo maa. Keɓe maa fof ena kisa e nder kaɓirgol maa.
settings.Learn more about Progressive Web Apps: Ɓeydu anndude e Jaaɓnirɗe Geese Yeeso
settings.legacyDataDescription: Aɗa jogii {size} keɓe iwde yamre ɓooyɗo. Ɗum ena waawi dirtineede, yaltineede, walla momteede ngam udditde nokku.
settings.legacyDeleteSuccess: Keɓe ɓooyɗe momtaama no haaniri tee {size} udditiima.
settings.legacyDeleteError: Momtude keɓe ɓooyɗe woorii. Tiiɗno fuɗɗito.
settings.deleteLegacyConfirm: Aɗa tannyoraa yiɗde momtude keɓe ɓooyɗe fof? Ngol gollal waawaa firteede.

aboutYou.title: Baɗɗe Maa
aboutYou.shareBasicInfoDescription: So hurminiima, AI anndat innde maa, tiitoonde, e catal maa iwde humpitol maa
aboutYou.preferredNameDescription: Waylu innde hollirde maa. Accu mehol ngam huutoraade innde humpitol maa
aboutYou.preferredNameDescriptionWithSync: No AI noddirta ma. Accu mehol ngam huutoraade innde hollirde maa iwde Teelte Kuuɓɗe.
aboutYou.additionalContextPlaceholder: Yeru, Miɗo gollii e golle ngesa, miɗo yiɗi jaabte ɗakkaaje, mi ena naamnoo sanne baɗɗe laabi cellal...
aboutYou.additionalContextDescription: Humpito goɗɗo mo njiɗ-ɗaa AI annda baɗɗe maa

tts.title: Binndi-to-Daande
tts.qualityDescription: Moƴƴol ɓurɗo toowde mahata nanndol ɓurɗo moƴƴude kono huutoroo geese ɓurɗe
tts.previewText: Ɗum ko ƴeewndol teelte daande cuɓaaɗe ɗee.
tts.noVoicesAvailable: Alaa daande goodɗe ngam ngal ɗemngal

activeFiles.autoPinUploadsDescription: Paɗlo fayliiji ɓeydii jaasi haɗi ɓe waawan seerude e konteks maa

settings.quarantineDataDescription: Ɓeɗɗitii {count} bayyinol {count, plural, one {item} other {items}} ({size}) e dille ɗi mbayri, ɗum waawani anndude si tawii.
settings.deleteQuarantineConfirm: A tunaniɗaa momtude kala bayyinol quarantine? Toŋngol ngol waawaa firtude.
settings.quarantineDeleteSuccess: Bayyinol quarantine kala momtaama e success.

emptyState.changeDisplayName: Dobo ngam waylude no min noddirta ma

createDiagrams.title: Sos Nate
createDiagrams.prompt: Hollu mi no mbaaw-ɗaa sosde nate e ɗowtere. Ko ɗowtere, golle, walla yuɓɓooji hol ɗe mbaaw-ɗaa wallitde mi ƴeewde? Hokku mi yeruuji.

draftContent.title: Winndu Loowdi Keeringal
draftContent.prompt: Miɗo hatojini ballal winndiyankaagal ɗereeji keerinɗi - iimeelji, ñaawte, tonngooɗe. Aɗa waawi hollirde mi yeruuji no mbaaw-ɗaa wallitde e fannuuji winndiyankaagal njulaagu ceertuɗi?

analyzeInformation.title: Ƴeewndito Humpito
analyzeInformation.prompt: Hol no mbaaw-ɗaa wallitde mi ƴeewndude keɓe walla humpito? Hollu mi peewe ceertuɗe no mbaaw-ɗaa feccude limooje, yiytude maale, walla ɓootude paamaale iwde ɗereeji walla keɓe.

planOrganize.title: Eɓɓo & Yuɓɓin
planOrganize.prompt: Aɗa waawi wallitde mi eɓɓude eɓɓooje walla yuɓɓinde golle? Hokku mi yeruuji no mbaaw-ɗaa sosde sahaaji, doggole, walla eɓɓooje e yuɓɓooji ceertuɗi.

brainstormIdeas.title: Miijto Miijooji
brainstormIdeas.prompt: Miɗo yiɗi miijtoraade peeje ngam caɗeele. Hollu mi no njiy-ɗaa miijto cosaan e mahtol miijooji - ko ɗume naamne naamno-ɗaa e no njiylorto-ɗaa mbaadiiji?

buildPresentations.title: Mah Hollitgol
buildPresentations.prompt: Hol no mbaaw-ɗaa wallitde mi sosde hollitgol? Hollu mi yeruuji yuɓɓooji hollitgol ceertuɗi, wasiyaaji ƴeewndol, e no yuɓɓinir-ɗaa humpito ngam ɗowaaɓe ceertuɗe.

workWithCode.title: Gollu e Dokkol
workWithCode.prompt: Aɗa waawi wallitde e winndiyankaagal dokkol walla binndi? Hollu mi yeruuji - so ko winndiyankaagal dokkol keso, moƴƴitinde caɗeele, walla faaminde no huunde gollirtee daaƴre-daaƴre.

decisionSupport.title: Wallitorde Ñaawol
decisionSupport.prompt: Miɗo hatojini ñaawde kono mi anndaa no ƴeewndirtee cuɓe am. Aɗa waawi hollirde mi yuɓɓooji walla peewe ceertuɗe ɗe kuutoro-ɗaa ngam wallitde miijtoraade cuɓe?

summarizeSynthesize.title: Tonngito & Renndin
summarizeSynthesize.prompt: Hol no mballitir-ɗaa tonngitde ɗereeji juutɗi walla renndinde humpito iwde iwdiiji keewɗi? Hollu mi yeruuji mbaydiiji tonngooɗe ceertuɗe e tolnooji humpito.

explainTopics.title: Faammin Topiikuuji Ɓittɗi
explainTopics.prompt: Aɗa waawi faaminde miijooji ɓittɗi e kelme ñeeñɗe? Hollu mi no peccinir-ɗaa miijooji ɓittɗi, kuutoroo nanndaale, e feewni faaminde ngam tolnooji ganndal ceertuɗi.

createSchedules.title: Sos Sahaaji
createSchedules.prompt: Miɗo hatojini ballal yuɓɓinde sahaa e sosde sahaaji. Hollu mi peewe ceertuɗe no mbaaw-ɗaa yuɓɓinde doggole, kalondee, walla eɓɓooje sahaa e yeruuji.

agents.description: Sos e toppito wakiiluuji AI keeriɗɗi jogiiɗi baɗe keeriɗɗe. Ɗee wakiiluuji ena ngollii e nokku MSF AI Assistant Foundry.
agents.advancedFeatureTitle: Baɗal Toowɗo - Ena Hatojini Jokkondiral e Goomu Karallaagal Ballitooɗo AI
agents.advancedFeatureWarning: Wakiiluuji keeriɗɗi ko e nokku MSF AI Assistant Foundry tan ngollotoo. ID wakiiluuji ena foti sosireede e goomu karallaagal Ballitooɗo AI e ngol nokku tigi tee jokkondireede e maa hade huutoragol.
agents.noAgentsDescription: Sos wakiilu maa gadano keeriɗɗo ngam yaajnude baɗe AI e kuutorɗe e jikkuuji keeriɗɗi.

advancedOptions.title: Cuɓe Toowɗe
advancedOptions.fixedTemperatureNote: Tinndina: Oo masiŋ ena huutoroo ɓure ngulndam ɗakkiiɗe ngam golle duumiiɗe.

searchMode.title: Feere Yiylaango
searchMode.subtitle: Ena huutoroo yiylaango geese so hatojiniima
searchMode.azureAgentModeDescription: Ɓuri yaawde kono mooftata keɓe jokkondiral e lewru
searchMode.privacyInfoDescription: Jokkondiral maa timmungal neldete to wakiilu Azure AI Foundry.

customAgent.label: Wakiilu Keeriɗɗo:
customAgent.description: Oo wakiilu ena gollii e nokku MSF AI Assistant Foundry tawi kuutorɗe hurminaama sahaa kala.

modelTypeIcons.agent: Wakiilu jogiiɗo kuutorɗe sahaa-goonga & heɓol geese

gpt_4_1.name: GPT-4.1
gpt_4_1.description: Masiŋ AI golliroowo GPT-4.1 e yiylaango geese sahaa-goonga rewrude e Bing. Ena hokka humpito keso, ñeɲtinol goonga, e ganndol kewuuji jooni. Ɓuri moƴƴude ngam wiɗto hatojinɗo humpito keso, ƴeewndital kewuuji, e ñeɲtinol goonga.

gpt_5_2.name: GPT-5.2
gpt_5_2.description: Masiŋ OpenAI ɓurɗo toowde, ɓurɗo waawde e miijo ɓittɗo, mahde dokkol, e ñaawde caɗeele karallaagal. Ɓuri moƴƴude ngam golle ƴeewndital, pellitte dokkol, wiɗto, e faaminde ceɓɓitiiɗe. Ena walliita waylude tiiɗndam miijo e ɓeydagol jaabtol.

gpt_5_mini.name: GPT-5 Mini
gpt_5_mini.description: Yamre GPT-5 ɓurnde yaawde e lesde njaru, moƴƴitinɗo ngam yaawnere tawi moƴƴol toowɗo. Timmi ngam golle ñalnde kala, naamne jaawɗe, e jaaɓnirɗe hatojinɗe jaabte jaawɗe. Potiɗɗo moƴƴo e golle e moƴƴol.

gpt_5_2_chat.name: GPT-5.2 Chat
gpt_5_2_chat.description: Ñaawanre GPT-5.2 wentorɗo e jaɓɓorgo moƴƴude ley conversational e yimɓe ɓuri hilde. Moƴƴi e ñaama buggitare, heftinirde yimɓe, geseede kiɗɗe, e waɗde ñaawdi to ñaawndu. Moƴƴi tawa ñaawdi to feere, ɗaɓɓannde counseling, e suɓre ɓe nanndiri yimɓe.

o3.name: o3
o3.description: Masiŋ miijo OpenAI ɓurɗo toowde jogiiɗo baɗe ñaawde caɗeele ɓennduɗe. Ɓuri waawde e hiisaaje ɓittɗe, miijo ganndal, pellitte dokkol, e golle miijo daaƴre-keewɗe. Palal saraaji 200K yaajɗo. Ena walliita ɗowde tiiɗndam miijo.

llama_4_maverick.name: Llama 4 Maverick
llama_4_maverick.description: Masiŋ yaawɗo e lesɗo njaru iwde Meta. Moƴƴo ngam golle ñalnde kala hono winndiyankaagal, tonngol, e ballal dokkol baasal. Potiɗɗo moƴƴo e yaawnere e moƴƴol ngam golle goowaaɗe.

deepseek_r1.name: DeepSeek-R1
deepseek_r1.description: Annduɗo miijo holloowo golle mum daaƴre-daaƴre. Moƴƴo sanne ngam caɗeele hiisaaje, pellitte miijo, e faamde miijooji ɓittɗi. Ƴeew no miijtortoo caɗeele e sahaa-goonga.

deepseek_v3_1.name: DeepSeek-V3.1
deepseek_v3_1.description: Masiŋ semmbe kuuɓɗo ɓurɗo waawde e winndiyankaagal dokkol e karallaagal. Moƴƴo ngam moƴƴitinde dokkol, winndiyankaagal ɗereeji, e faaminde miijooji karallaagal. Yaawɗo e hoolaare ngam golle mahdi.

grok_3.name: Grok 3
grok_3.description: Masiŋ baawɗo keewɗum iwde xAI ganndaaɗo sabu jaabte ceertuɗe. Moƴƴo ngam yeewterɗe udditiiɗe, eɓɓooje cosaan, e ñaawde caɗeele ɓittɗe.

claude_opus_4_5.name: Claude Opus 4.5
claude_opus_4_5.description: Masiŋ Anthropic ɓurɗo waawde jogiiɗo miijo, dokkol, e cosaan tiiɗɗi. Ɓuri moƴƴude ngam ƴeewndital ɓittɗo, wiɗto, e golle hatojinɗe faamol luggiɗɗo.

claude_sonnet_4_5.name: Claude Sonnet 4.5
claude_sonnet_4_5.description: Masiŋ Claude potiɗɗo hokkuɗo golle moƴƴe e dokkol, ƴeewndital, e golle cosaan. Moƴƴo ngam kuutoragol ñalnde kala e jaabte jaawɗe.

claude_opus_4_1.name: Claude Opus 4.1
claude_opus_4_1.description: Masiŋ Claude Opus gontaangal ɓennuɗo. Moƴƴo sanne ngam golle dokkol ɓittɗe, ƴeewndital ceɓɓitiiɗo, e faamol ceertuɗo.

claude_haiku_4_5.name: Claude Haiku 4.5
claude_haiku_4_5.description: Masiŋ Claude yaawɗo e lesɗo njaru moƴƴitinɗo ngam golle jaawɗe. Moƴƴo ngam naamne ñeeñɗe, tonngol, e jaaɓnirɗe keewɗe.

searchMode.title: Faaminde Feere Yiylaango
searchMode.subtitle: Faamde cuɓe yiylaango maa e ɗo keɓe maa mooftirtee
searchMode.noSearchDescription: Jaabte ɓurɗe yaawde tawi alaa baɗal yiylaango geese. Jokkondiral maa timmungal ena heddii e geesiyankooɗo maa - alaa fes mooftaama e lewru.
searchMode.viewDetailsBelow: Ngam humpito ɓurɗo, ƴeew ɗowtere karallaagal les.
searchMode.legendNoSearch: Geesiyankooɗo Maa (mooftirde nokkuure) | Sarweer Ballitooɗo AI | Azure OpenAI (ɗowtere-alaa)
searchMode.privacyDescription: Ena huutoroo yiylaango geese so hatojiniima kono ɓuri leelde sabu daaƴre keewɗe ena tawee. Naamne yiylaango tan mooftaama e Azure - jokkondiral maa timmungal ena heddii e geesiyankooɗo maa.
searchMode.legendPrivacy: Geesiyankooɗo Maa (mooftirde nokkuure) | Sarweer Ballitooɗo AI | Azure AI Foundry (naamne yiylaango tan) | Azure OpenAI (ɗowtere-alaa)
searchMode.foundryDescription: Jaabte ɓurɗe yaawde tawi baɗal yiylaango geese ena waɗi. Jokkondiral maa timmungal mooftaama e mooftirde keɓe Azure AI Foundry, wonaa e geesiyankooɗo maa tan.
searchMode.legendFoundry: Geesiyankooɗo Maa (mooftirde nokkuure) | Sarweer Ballitooɗo AI | Wakiilu Azure AI Foundry (mooftata jokkondiral timmuɗo)
searchMode.whyTheseOptionsText1: Ɗee ko peeje yiylaango goodɗe caggal Azure momtii API Yiylaango Bing mum, nde Ballitooɗo AI hoolaanoo aranoo.
searchMode.whyTheseOptionsText2: Goomu nguu ena yiyloo peeje yiylaango ɓurɗe suturo. Cuɓe ɗiɗi jooni ɗee ena kuutoroo baɗe yiylaango Azure AI Foundry kono ena ceertiri e no keɓe jokkondiral ɓurɗe lollineede.
searchMode.azureDeprecatedBingApi: Azure momtii API Yiylaango Bing mum
searchMode.footerNote: Peewe ɗiɗi ɗee ena mooftoo jokkondiral maa nokku e geesiyankooɗo maa. Aɗa waawi waylude peewe sahaa kala e teelte masiŋ.

descriptions.foundLegacyData: Min njiyii keɓe iwde yamre ɓooyɗo. Aɗa yiɗi dirtinde ɗum ngam gollodaade e yuɓɓo moƴƴitinaaɗo?
descriptions.storageSpaceWarning: Keɓe maa ena hatojini nokku ɓurɗo ko woodi jooni. Miɗen wasiyoo huutoraade feere dirtagol seeɗa-seeɗa.
descriptions.pleaseWait: Tiiɗno faddo e nder hesɗitingol keɓe maa...
descriptions.dataIsSafe: Keɓe maa goongɗinɗe ena kisi. Aɗa waawi fuɗɗitaade walla ɗaaltu jooni.
descriptions.itemsTooLarge: Ɗee kuuje ena ɓuri mawnude ngam naatde e mooftirde. Aɗa waawi yaltinde ɗum, udditde nokku, walla jokkude tawi alaa ɗum en.

message.warning: Mooftirde geesiyankooɗo maa ena woni e {percent}% baawɗe.
message.critical: Mooftirde geesiyankooɗo maa ena famɗi sanne e {percent}% baawɗe.
message.emergency: Mooftirde geesiyankooɗo maa ina fawii heɓde e {percent}%!

storageWarning.consequence: So mooftirde heɓii, aɗa waawi yaltude e jokkondire kese tee jaaɓnirgal ngal ena waawi dartaade gollude no haaniri.

confirm.title: Tabbintin Laaɓɓitingol
confirm.message: Ɗum momtat jokkondire {count} haa bada. Ɗum waawaa firteede.

clearing.title: Ina Laaɓɓitina Mooftirde
clearing.message: Tiiɗno faddo e nder ittugol jokkondire...

error.title: Laaɓɓitingol Woorii
error.message: Juumre waɗii tuma laaɓɓitingol jokkondire. Tiiɗno fuɗɗito.

fileUpload.failedToOpenInEditor: Udditde fiilde e taƴtoowo dokkol woorii. Tiiɗno fuɗɗito.

artifact.editsNotSaved: Baylitte danndaaka. Neldu rewrude e neldol walla aawto ngam danndinde baylitte.
artifact.fileIncludedWithMessage: Fiilde e baylitte naatniima e neldol

codeEditor.startTyping: Fuɗɗo tapde walla naamno AI maha dokkol
codeEditor.codeWillSync: Dokkol ena jokkondirta e hoore mum iwde nelɗe yeewtere

dropdown.searchTooltip:
Hurmin yiylaango geese ngam neldol kala.

Ena hokka humpito keso huutoriiɗo heɓol geese Bing sahaa-goonga.
dropdown.attachTooltip:
Ɓoornin piilde, nate, walla nanndol/wideyoo.

Mbaydiiji ballitaaɗi:
• Nate: JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP (5MB ɓurngal, haa 10)
• Ɗereeji: PDF, DOCX, XLSX, PPTX, TXT, MD (10MB ɓurngal, haa 3)
• Keɓe: CSV, JSON, XML, YAML (10MB ɓurngal, haa 3)
• Dokkol: PY, JS, TS, JAVA, C, CPP, GO, ekn. (10MB ɓurngal, haa 3)
• Nanndol/Wideyoo: MP3, WAV, MP4, WebM (25MB ɓurngal, fiilde 1)

Timmungo: piilde 10, 50MB ɓurngal
dropdown.transcribeTooltip:
Nuldu piilde nanndol walla wideyoo ngam winnditagol.

Mbaydiiji ballitaaɗi: MP3, MP4, WAV, WebM, M4A, MPEG, MPGA
Mawngu ɓurngal: 25MB

Winnditagol ena waɗee e hoore mum nde neldu-ɗaa neldol ngol.
dropdown.selectToneDescription: Suɓo humpitol daande ngam nelɗe maa
dropdown.translateDocumentTooltip:
Fir ɗereeji to ɗemngal goɗngal.

Mbaydiiji ballitaaɗi: Word, Excel, PowerPoint, PDF, HTML, TXT
Mawngu ɓurngal: 40MB

Ena walliita ɗemɗe 80+ e piilde helmere suɓtanaaɗe.

transcription.instructionsPlaceholder: Saraaji ngam moƴƴitinde laaɓal (yeru, inɗe, helmere)
transcription.maxDurationNote: Piilde mawɗe ena mbaawi ɓooyde haa {minutes} hojomaaje
transcription.transcriptExpired: Winnditagol ngam {filename} gasii. Winnditagolji ena momtee e hoore mum caggal balɗe {days} ngam suturo.
transcription.expirationWarning: Winnditagol ngam {filename} ena gasoo e nder balɗe {days}. Ñokku loowdi ndii so aɗa hatojini mooftude ɗum.

documentTranslation.title: Firgol Ɗerewol
documentTranslation.glossaryHelp: Nuldu fiilde helmere CSV, TSV, walla XLIFF ngam helmere keeriɗɗe.
documentTranslation.glossaryTooLarge: Fiilde helmere ɓuri mawnude. Mawngu ɓurngal ko {maxSize}.
documentTranslation.documentTooLarge: Ɗerewol ɓuri mawnude. Mawngu ɓurngal ko {maxSize}.
documentTranslation.expired: Ngol firgol gasii tee alaa kadi
documentTranslation.expiresSoon: Ena gasoo e balɗe {days} - aawto law

customAgents.title: Wakiiluuji Keeriɗɗi
customAgents.experimentalBlurb: Ƴeewndal — mahaama e jokkondiral perɗo e huutorooɓe MSF semmbe. Wonaa ngam kuutoragol kuuɓɗo.

privacy.policyDescription: Janngu no keɓe maa ndeenirtee e ko humpito haanaa naatnireede
privacy.termsDescription: Ƴeewto peewe kuutoragol moƴƴo e kuutoragolji kaɗaaɗi
privacy.localStorage: Jokkondire maa mooftaama nokku e kaɓirgol maa
privacy.azureInfra: Moƴƴinde keɓe fof ena waɗee e nder yuɓɓooji MSF huutoriiɗi kaɓirɗe Azure
privacy.noPersonalData: Hoto naatnu keɓe keeriɗɗe (inɗe, limooje cinndol, ekn.)
privacy.noSensitiveData: Hoto naatnu humpito golle tiiɗɗo sanne
privacy.contactUs: Jokkondiru e amen law so aɗa jogii ngañamaame suturo:

variableModal.fillInstructions: Heɓɓin wayluɓe les ɗee ngam feewnude tinndinol maa

chatInput.filePickerError: Horiima udditde suɓoowo piilde. Ƴeewto huutoraade woɗɗin-yoppu.

activeFiles.title: Fayliiji ɓurndam
activeFiles.unpinnedTooltip: Wonaa nannitere: waawi gollude walla momtude
activeFiles.sessionQuotaExhausted: Qoota bisinooki roundu tagii. Bisinooki momtinii.
activeFiles.pinBlockedTooLarge: Bisinooki suuɗi loowdi nannitde ({tokens} tokens, dencaa: {limit})
activeFiles.activationRejectedTooLarge: Bisinooki suuɗi loowdi e ɗum doole active context ({tokens} tokens, dencaa: {limit})
activeFiles.sessionQuotaNearlyExhausted: Qoota roundu ngalaa — bisinooki active waawi walaa

quarantine.title: Kisennangol jawdiiji
quarantine.itemCount: {count, plural, one {# jawdi} other {# jawdiiji}} waɗi lollondiral data
quarantine.bannerMessage: {count, plural, one {# jawdi anndi lollondiral data tawi kisennangol.} other {# jawdiiji anndi lollondiral data tawi kisennangol.}}
